subcodes.first_line: Lo, joy proclaimeth: "My soul be a sacrifice for Thy sorrow, O Thou Wronged One of the worlds!" Verily, gladness crieth out: "My spirit..." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان السرور یقول نفسی لحزنک الفداء یا مظلوم العالمین ان الابتهاج ینادی روحی
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @suffering and imprisonment, @proclamation to Muslims, @proclamation to Christians, @proclamation to Jews, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
